title: Lyra2 Autoregressive Inference Pipeline
interaction_flow: CallerScript → model_loader: load_model_from_checkpoint(config_file, experiment_name, checkpoint_path, enable_fsdp=False)
model_loader → model_loader: get_config_module(config_file) → make_config() → override(config, experiment_opts)
model_loader → Lyra2Model: instantiate(config.model).cuda() + on_train_start()
model_loader → model_loader: load .pth via easy_io.load() OR DCP via DistributedCheckpointer + dcp.load()
model_loader → CallerScript: return (model, config)
CallerScript → depth_utils: load_da3_model(da3_model_name, device) → da3_model
CallerScript → depth_utils: load_moge_model(device) → moge_model [optional, for scale alignment]
CallerScript → depth_utils: _da3_infer_depth_intrinsics_single(da3_model, img_rgb_uint8, target_hw) → (image_chw01, depth_hw, K_33, mask_hw)
CallerScript → camera_traj_utils: build_camera_trajectory(initial_w2c_44, K_33, center_depth, video_len, trajectory, direction, strength) → (w2cs [T,4,4], Ks [T,3,3])
camera_traj_utils → camera_utils: create_spiral/horizontal/orbit/dolly_zoom_trajectory(...) [dispatches by trajectory type]
CallerScript → CallerScript: assemble data_batch {video, t5_text_embeddings, camera_w2c, intrinsics, depth, fps, padding_mask}
CallerScript → run_lyra2_sample: run_lyra2_sample(model, data_batch, args, da3_model=da3_model)
run_lyra2_sample → Lyra2Model: _normalize_video_databatch_inplace(data_batch)
run_lyra2_sample → Lyra2InferencePipeline: __init__(model, args, first_frame, first_depth, first_cam_w2c, first_intrinsics, da3_model)
Lyra2InferencePipeline → Lyra2InferencePipeline: _get_vae_handles(model) → (vae_iface, vae_wrap, vae_core) [model.tokenizer.model.model chain]
Lyra2InferencePipeline → WanVAE: _prime_encoder_cache_with_history(init_video, vae_wrap, vae_core, model) → (history_latents, enc_feat_cache)
WanVAE → Lyra2Model: _vae_encode_range_stream(video_cast, 0, T, skip_first_frame=False) → feats
WanVAE → Lyra2Model: _encoder_feats_to_normalized_latents(feats) → history_latents
Lyra2InferencePipeline → WanVAE: _decode_new_latent_chunk(vae_wrap, vae_core, dec_feat_cache, history_latents, latent_offset=0) [warmup/cache prime]
WanVAE → WanVAE: vae_core.conv2(z) → x; then vae_core.decoder(x[:,:,t:t+1], feat_cache=dec_feat_cache) per frame
Lyra2InferencePipeline → Sparse3DCache: __init__(downsample=4, store_values=True)
Lyra2InferencePipeline → Sparse3DCache: add(first_depth_b1hw, first_w2c, first_K, latent_index=0, frame_id=0)
run_lyra2_sample → run_lyra2_sample: compute num_iters = ceil(tokens_needed / tokens_per_step)
run_lyra2_sample → run_lyra2_sample: [LOOP] for ar_idx in range(num_iters): slice cam_chunk, intr_chunk, pos_t5 from data_batch
run_lyra2_sample → Lyra2InferencePipeline: autoregressive_step(cam_w2c_chunk, intrinsics_chunk, t5_text_embeddings, neg_t5, is_last_step)
Lyra2InferencePipeline → Lyra2InferencePipeline: _append_cameras(cam_w2c_chunk, intrinsics_chunk) → concat to self.cam_w2c, self.intrinsics

Lyra2InferencePipeline → Lyra2Model: _prepare_lyra2_inputs(history_full, gen_cond, spatial_cache, video, buffer_depth_B_1_H_W, camera_w2c, intrinsics, video_indices) → (latents_full, cond_latent, mask, buffer_cond_latents)

Lyra2InferencePipeline → Lyra2Model: inference(history_latents=history_window, cond_latent, cond_latent_mask, cond_latent_buffer, guidance, seed, num_steps, shift, t5_text_embeddings, neg_t5_text_embeddings, last_hist_frame, fps, padding_mask) → gen_chunk
Lyra2InferencePipeline → WanVAE: _decode_new_latent_chunk(vae_wrap, vae_core, dec_feat_cache, gen_chunk, latent_offset=history_latents.shape[2]) → new_generated_frames
WanVAE → WanVAE: _offload_diffusion_to_cpu(model); unnormalize latent → z; vae_core.conv2(z) → x
WanVAE → WanVAE: [per-frame loop] vae_core.decoder(x[:,:,t:t+1], feat_cache=dec_feat_cache, feat_idx=[0]) → out_t; concat → video_chunk
WanVAE → WanVAE: _restore_diffusion_to_gpu(model)
Lyra2InferencePipeline → Lyra2Model: vae_encode_with_cache(enc_cache, new_generated_frames, start_t, end_t) → (feats_gen, enc_cache_out) [re-encode for history latents]
Lyra2InferencePipeline → Lyra2Model: _encoder_feats_to_normalized_latents(feats_gen) → gen_chunk_reencoded
Lyra2InferencePipeline → Lyra2InferencePipeline: cat history_frames, history_latents with new chunk
Lyra2InferencePipeline → Lyra2InferencePipeline: _update_depth_cache(end_px_idx) [skipped on last step]
Lyra2InferencePipeline → Lyra2InferencePipeline: _predict_da3_depth_window(da3_model, history_frames, start_index, abs_last_idx, cam_w2c, intrinsics, frame_interval, max_history_frames) → da3_out
Lyra2InferencePipeline → DA3Model: da3_model.inference(images=[uint8 frames], extrinsics, intrinsics, align_to_input_ext_scale=True, infer_gs=False, process_res=...) → prediction
Lyra2InferencePipeline → Sparse3DCache: add(depth, w2c, K, latent_index, frame_id) [per new frame in window]
run_lyra2_sample → Lyra2InferencePipeline: build_outputs(da3_gs_export_stem, log_prefix) → {video, warp_video, use_pose, use_plucker}
run_lyra2_sample → CallerScript: return result dict {video, warp_video, ...}
CallerScript → CallerScript: save_img_or_video(video_01, video_path, fps=args.fps)
key_relationships: Lyra2InferencePipeline owns Lyra2Model (reference), WanVAE handles (vae_wrap/vae_core), Sparse3DCache (retrieval_cache), DA3Model (local_da3_model)
Lyra2InferencePipeline calls Lyra2Model._prepare_lyra2_inputs (pose conditioning / warp prep)
Lyra2Model contains tokenizer → WanVAE wrapper → WanVAE_ core
load_model_from_checkpoint depends_on DistributedCheckpointer (DCP path) or easy_io (pth path)

standalone_functions._prime_encoder_cache_with_history(init_v: encodes history, clones enc_feat_cache, returns (history_latents, enc_feat_cache)
standalone_functions._decode_new_latent_chunk(vae_wrap, vae_c: streaming decode: unnorm → conv2 → per-frame decoder, returns pixel video_chunk
standalone_functions._predict_da3_depth_window(*, da3_model,: selects strided frame window, calls da3_model.inference, returns {frame_indices, prediction}
standalone_functions.run_lyra2_sample(model, data_batch, args: entry point: init pipeline, AR loop, return build_outputs()

steps: load via easy_io (.pth) OR DistributedCheckpointer + dcp.load() (DCP dir)

ar_loop_logic.num_iters: ceil(tokens_needed / tokens_per_step) where tokens_needed = ceil((num_frames-1) / frames_per_latent)
ar_loop_logic.per_step: slice cam_chunk [start_px_idx:end_px_idx] from full trajectory; select t5 embedding by chunk key lookup; call pipeline.autoregressive_step
ar_loop_logic.depth_update: after every step except last: run DA3 on strided history window, add new depth+pose entries to Sparse3DCache
ar_loop_logic.offload_support: optional CPU offload of diffusion model during VAE encode/decode and DA3 inference

important_notes: Pipeline is FramePack-style: fixed history window (T_hist latents) + growing generated sequence. Camera poses come from either build_camera_trajectory (ZoomGS script) or load_trajectory from .npz (custom_traj script). DA3 depth is updated each AR step for pose conditioning via Sparse3DCache warping. Optional MoGe alignment scales DA3 depth on the first frame. Supports per-chunk T5 text embeddings keyed by frame index. Context-parallel inference supported via megatron process_group.
